content.en:
......

Primordial Black Sea.

A great battle is breaking out, several half-step six-fold ancestors are chasing down a half-step six-fold ancestor, and the area of the primordial Black Sea is shattered.

However, the strength of this half-step sixfold ancestor was really strong, and it was stronger than these half-step sixfold ancestors at all, but after another half-step sixfold ancestor joined, he couldn't bear it and was soon injured.

So, he fled, quickly shattering a barrier and stepping into the territory of another higher primordial realm.

And these half-step six-fold ancestors also chased and killed, but because they were one step slower, they lost their traces.

"Don't worry, the other party has been hit by the blood shadow seal, it is estimated that he has just sealed the blood shadow seal for a short time, but with his strength, he can't get rid of it in a short time, and if he dares to try to remove the blood shadow print, we will sense it. "

"This guy is in the late stage of the fusion of the half-step sixfold original ancestor, this must be the body, as long as this high-level origin area is blocked, and then slowly search, there should be hope to find him. "

"This is the territory of the Shangling Origin Domain, the Shangling Origin Domain doesn't even have a sixfold primordial ancestor, don't worry about what the Shangling Origin Domain dares to say, if they dare to talk nonsense, Lord Changbai will directly suppress them. "

The Changbai Lord in their mouths was a sixfold primordial ancestor, and he was also the strongest person in the Changbai High Origin Domain.

......

In a river basin.

The True Mountain Saint Ancestor, who was covered in blood, looked at a blood-colored mark on his hand, and his face was very ugly.

"Blood Shadow Seal, I can only seal it for the time being, and I can't get rid of it, otherwise once I impact the Blood Shadow Seal, those guys will sense it. Damn, don't you just snatch your share of the Taixuan Light, and chase and beat you like before!"

Fortunately, he had come to the area of the Upper Primordial Realm, and there was such a river basin, and he also took advantage of the space-time distortion gap that broke the barriers between the Upper Primordial Domains, and directly used one Primordial Domain after another as a transit to quickly get rid of them.

Then, he escaped into the watershed, completely restrained his breath, and was safe for the time being.

In any case, he recovered from his injuries first, and then practiced here, and if he could step into the Sixfold Ancestor in one fell swoop, he would no longer be afraid of them.

Of course, it would be too difficult to become a Sixfold Ancestor!

Upper Spirit Primordial Domain, Void Tooth Holy Gate.

Ye Tian was still cultivating, and suddenly the Void Tooth Holy Ancestor convened a meeting with them.

So, Ye Tian came here, almost all of the people who participated in this meeting were the vein masters of the late stage of the Fifth Origin Ancestor, as well as the main vein elders, and although Ye Tian was only in the middle stage of the Fifth Origin Ancestor, they all knew Ye Tian's strength, so there was no problem in participating in this meeting.

meeting.

The Void Tooth Saint Ancestor said, "Not long ago, a group of half-step sixfold ancestors broke into this Primordial Black Sea region where the Upper Spirit High Origin Domain was located, and they haven't left yet. They are from the Changbai High Origin Domain, and after our investigation, we know that something big has happened in the Changbai High Origin Domain!"

"What is the big deal to let a group of half-step sixfold ancestors break into us?"

Many ancestors are curious.

The Void Tooth Saint Ancestor said: "A half-step sixfold ancestor named True Mountain Saint Ancestor, taking advantage of the Changbai Dao Ancestor's departure from the Changbai High Origin Domain, snatched a copy of the Taixuan Light of the Changbai High Origin Domain, and also killed two half-step sixfold origin ancestors who stayed behind, but it was only a will clone, so it was not a loss. Then, several top half-step sixfold primordial ancestors of the Changbai High Origin Domain pursued and killed the True Mountain Saint Ancestor, all the way to our Upper Linggao Origin Domain. "

"Changbai High Origin Domain, this is the High Origin Domain next door to us, the ranking is much higher than ours, with a Sixfold Origin Ancestor, dozens of half-step Sixfold Origin Ancestors, I didn't expect the True Mountain Saint Ancestor to dare to fight the idea of the Changbai High Origin Domain, is he not afraid that the Changbai Dao Ancestor will come back and kill him?"

"What is the Light of the Taixuan?"

Ye Tian asked curiously.

The Void Tooth Holy Ancestor explained: "The Taixuan Light is one of the supreme treasures that helps the half-step Sixfold Origin Ancestor break through to become the Sixfold Ancestor, even the Changbai High Origin Domain can only be born after infinite years, it is said that this Taixuan Light has been born for a long time, but the Changbai High Origin Domain has not given birth to a half-step Sixfold Origin Ancestor suitable for refining this Taixuan Light." Because he hadn't cultivated to a certain level, it was impossible for the Changbai Dao Ancestor to let the other half-step Sixfold Origin Ancestors waste the Taixuan Light!"

"It turned out to be a treasure that helped break through the Sixfold Ancestor!"

Only then did Ye Tian understand how angry the Changbai High Origin Domain was.

Compared to the loss of the Taixuan Light, the killing of the two half-step six-fold ancestor will clones is nothing.

"The half-step sixfold ancestors of the Changbai High Origin Domain haven't tracked down the True Mountain Ancestor, why haven't they left?" Ye Tian asked curiously: "That True Mountain Saint Ancestor only needs to disarm his will clone and hide the Taixuan Light. After endless years, I will send someone to fetch it, and there will be no problem with the Changbai High Plains!"

"No, the True Mountain Origin Ancestor can't do this, because he doesn't have a will clone!" The Void Tooth Saint Ancestor said, "Of course, it's not like the Endless Origin Ancestor yours, the True Mountain Origin Ancestor used to have a will clone, but now he doesn't. Because he had reached the late fusion level of the half-step sixfold ancestor, the half-step sixfold ancestor who had reached this level did not have a will clone. In other words, every Sixfold Ancestor also has no clone. Otherwise, Changbai Dao Ancestor would not have left directly. "

"There is no clone in the late stage of the fusion of the half-step sixfold ancestor, what does this mean?" Ye Tian was a little puzzled.

The Void Tooth Saint Ancestor said: "Endless Origin Ancestor, you haven't obtained the inheritance from the half-step Sixfold Origin Ancestor to the Sixfold Origin Ancestor, and there are a few people present who don't know. I'll talk about it this time, the cultivation process of the half-step sixfold ancestor is the fusion of the true body and the will clone, forming a will clone, fusion, and then condensing a will clone and then fusing again, just like this, fusing again and again, after reaching the ninth fusion, even if the will clone can be condensed, it cannot be stabilized, it must be fused in a short time, otherwise it will also crumble. Therefore, a top-notch half-step sixfold ancestor like the True Mountain Origin Ancestor couldn't use his will clone to fight, and he couldn't even leave him far. "

"I see!"

Ye Tian finally understood.

At this moment, the True Mountain Origin Ancestor was the true body of the body, and with the light of the Taixuan, he hid somewhere in the Upper Linggao Origin Region, and he didn't dare to show his head, or even dare to escape from the Upper Linggao Origin Region again.

Anyone can imagine what a piece of Taixuan Light represents, and that is the hope of the Sixfold Ancestor!

Everybody wants it!

The Void Tooth Saint Ancestor definitely wants it too!
